task_completion.visual_evidence: Firefox browser open to basketball-reference.com, showing a player page for LeBron James, Stephen Curry, or Nikola Jokić.
A bookmark folder named 'NBA Scouting' is visible in the Firefox bookmarks bar, bookmark menu, or bookmark manager.
The 'NBA Scouting' bookmark folder is shown containing bookmarks for the Basketball Reference player pages of LeBron James, Stephen Curry, and Nikola Jokić.
A text editor (like Text Editor or VS Code) or terminal showing a file named `nba_comparison.json` located in the `Documents` directory.
The JSON file contains a key 'lebron_james' with correct career regular-season averages: ppg (26.9), apg (7.4), rpg (7.5), seasons played (22), and championships (4).
The JSON file contains a key 'stephen_curry' with correct career regular-season averages: ppg (24.8), apg (6.3), rpg (4.7), seasons played (16), and championships (4).
The JSON file contains a key 'nikola_jokic' with correct career regular-season averages: ppg (22.2), apg (7.4), rpg (11.0), seasons played (10), and championships (1).

integrity.description: Agent used a web browser to gather data
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent used the Firefox GUI to visit basketball-reference.com rather than using terminal commands like curl or python scripts to fetch data.

integrity.description: Agent used browser UI to create bookmarks
integrity.visual_evidence: Bookmarks and the bookmark folder were created using the browser's built-in bookmarking UI, not by directly editing browser profile database files via terminal.

integrity.description: Agent manually compiled the JSON file
integrity.visual_evidence: The JSON file was created and edited using a text editor or standard file creation methods, showing the agent actively typing or formatting the gathered data.

privileged_info_for_vlm: LeBron James: 26.9 PPG, 7.4 APG, 7.5 RPG, 22 seasons, 4 championships. Stephen Curry: 24.8 PPG, 6.3 APG, 4.7 RPG, 16 seasons, 4 championships. Nikola Jokić: 22.2 PPG, 7.4 APG, 11.0 RPG, 10 seasons, 1 championship. The JSON file must be saved at ~/Documents/nba_comparison.json and a Firefox bookmark folder named 'NBA Scouting' must contain the 3 player pages.
